S.FORM: == Robert Mugabe == Mntucing hngkawas 1924 idas 2 jiyax 21 ka Robert Mugabe ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Zimbabwa ta sayang o kiya ka Robert Mugabe, pnaah hngkawas 1987 idas 12 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ɾobəɾt mugabə == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɾobəɾt mugabə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *imbabwa ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɾobəɾt mugabə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: == Robert Mugabe == Mntucing hngkawas 1924 idas 2 jiyax 21 ka Robert Mugabe ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Zimbabwa ta sayang o kiya ka Robert Mugabe, pnaah hngkawas 1987 idas 12 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ɾobəɾt mugabə == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɾobəɾt mugabə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *imbabwa ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɾobəɾt mugabə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnatas
